scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env.worktree.local -e .env.local -- bun run worktree-env chat -- turbo run dev --filter=@chatjs/chat
scripts.dev:site: dotenv -e .env.worktree.local -e .env.local -- bun run worktree-env site -- turbo run dev --filter=@chatjs/site
scripts.test:e2e: dotenv -e .env.worktree.local -e .env.local -- bun run worktree-env chat -- turbo run test:e2e --filter=@chatjs/chat
scripts.test: bun test ./.agents/skills/worktree-ports/scripts/worktree-runtime.test.ts && dotenv -e .env.worktree.local -e .env.local -- bun run worktree-env chat -- turbo run test
scripts.skiller:apply: bunx skiller@latest apply && turbo run skiller:apply
scripts.start:chat: dotenv -e .env.worktree.local -e .env.local -- bun run worktree-env chat -- bun --filter=@chatjs/chat run start
scripts.dev:electron: dotenv -e .env.worktree.local -e .env.local -- bun run worktree-env electron -- turbo run electron:dev --filter=@chat-js/electron

overrides.//@better-auth/core: Pinned because @better-auth/electron and other @better-auth/* packages declare a strict peerDependency on @better-auth/core@1.5.6. Do not remove without auditing all @better-auth/* peer ranges.
